metadata.description: A collection of AI agent skills for software development

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Create a git commit with staged changes

plugins.name: daily-report
plugins.description: Generate daily work report from git commit history

plugins.name: web-fetch
plugins.description: Fetch a URL and return clean Markdown via r.jina.ai → markdown.new → defuddle.md fallback chain, with optional WEB_FETCH_PROXY proxy support

plugins.name: codefree
plugins.description: Delegate coding tasks to codefree (qwen-code fork) CLI from inside Claude Code. Must be used whenever the user mentions '研发云'.
